settings.text:
“Choosing the right pillow and mattress isn’t a one-size-fits-all process. Not only can the right bedding improve your sleep quality, but it can also alleviate pain and enhance recovery, especially if you’re dealing with chronic orthopedic issues.”

— Dr. Glen Rowell, PT, DPT, OCS

settings.heading: One Size Does Not Fit All™

settings.text:
Better alignment. Cooler nights. Pain-free mornings. It all starts with a pillow that's personally fit to your body type, sleep position, and temperature preference.

Cover

  • Instant-cooling
  • Moisture-wicking
  • Breathable fabrics
  • Removable & washable

Gusset

  • Breathable mesh
  • Patented Air-X® vents

Fill

  • Conforming or elevating support
  • Dual-sided comfort
  • Breathable foam and fiber materials

* Features may vary per pillow. Refer to each pillow’s product page for more details

settings.question: How do I find the right Performance® Pillow for my sleep needs?
settings.answer: Our Performance Pillows are designed to fit your personal body type, sleep position, and sleep concerns. Please use our interactive quiz above or contact us to assist in finding you the pillow that’s the best fit for you.

settings.question: Do I need to use a pillowcase with BEDGEAR Pillows?
settings.answer: BEDGEAR pillows feature sleep-enhancing technologies which perform best without an additional pillowcase. If you prefer to use a pillowcase, we recommend a BEDGEAR Performance Pillowcase which is designed to work with your pillow's advanced features. Our pillows have removable and washable covers, so you can maintain cleanliness without affecting performance.

settings.question: Is there a "break-in" period for BEDGEAR pillows?
settings.answer: At BEDGEAR, the traditional soft-to-firm scale is not what you may expect. Our blends of engineered fibers are designed for lasting support and optimal recover. The feel is determined by the level of support the product provides, meaning soft will conform to your shape and firm will elevate. A change in pillow may feel different and uncomfortable at first, but rest assured, within a couple of weeks, you will be sleeping more comfortably.

settings.question: How does this pillow keep me cool?
settings.answer: You’ve seen the term “temperature-regulating” from other brands—but here’s the truth: only your body can regulate its temperature. With enhanced breathability and cool-to-the-touch fabrics, BEDGEAR Performance® Pillows are designed to assist your body’s natural process by creating a cooler, more comfortable sleep environment.

settings.question: What makes a Performance® Pillow better than standard pillows?
settings.answer: A Performance Pillow is personally fit to you based on your body type, sleep position and temperature preference. We create a wide variety of pillows to meet the needs of every sleeper; whether you are a hot sleeper, side sleeper, big or small build, we have the pillow that is right for you.

settings.question: Will my pillow stay cool all night long?
settings.answer: We understand that all fabrics used on bedding are affected by the temperature of their surroundings. To enhance the cooling properties of your pillow, complete your sleep system with cooling sheets, blankets, and protectors to create the optimal sleep environment.

settings.question: What is the benefit of a hybrid-design pillow?
settings.answer: Hybrid-design pillows combine two or more fill types to provide the ideal balance of comfort and support. With one side slightly firmer and one side softer, you can choose your preferred feel night after night.

settings.question: How can I tell which side is more firm and which is more soft for my hybrid-design pillow?
settings.answer: When the pillow name is read facing up right, it is the firmer side. When the pillow name is facing upside down, it is the softer side.
